title: Warehouse storage — free period & overdue fees
bodyHtml:
Effective April 22, 2026 — LitBuy updated warehouse storage rules (mirrored from litbuy.com).

  • Each order (ID starting with “K”) gets 90 calendar days free storage from the day it is stocked and listed.
  • Reminders are sent 7 days before, 3 days before, and on expiry day via app + email.
  • From day 91, overdue storage fees accrue daily in CNY: paid item price × 0.2% (minimum ¥1/day, maximum ¥300/month per item).
  • If overdue fees remain unpaid for 30+ days after hitting the monthly cap, the item may be disposed per LitBuy Terms of Service.
  • Abnormal unsigned parcels: 30-day storage from “Received” status, no reminders—destroyed if unmatched.

View fees in My Warehouse or order details; fee accrual stops when you create a parcel shipment (accrued fees still due).

title: International shipping — key policy points
bodyHtml:
Summary of LitBuy’s published Shipping Policy (full text on litbuy.com):

  1. Processing time — warehouse handling before the parcel leaves China.
  2. Destinations — LitBuy notifies you if a lane is unsupported.
  3. Delivery estimates — start after the parcel ships; times are not guaranteed.
  4. Delays — customs, weather, or carrier issues are outside LitBuy’s control.
  5. Fees — shown at checkout before payment.
  6. Tracking — allow up to 48 hours for first scan updates.
  7. Customs — Tax-free channels: LitBuy handles clearance/duties; other channels: buyer responsible.
  8. Addresses — buyer must provide accurate shipping info.
  9. Lost/damaged — contact support@litbuy.com within 7 days of delivery or expected delivery.
  10. Refunds — in-transit or customs-held parcels are not refundable until confirmed failure/return.

title: Rehearsal parcel & combined payment
bodyHtml:
LitBuy publishes separate notices for How to Use Rehearsal Parcel?, How to Submit Rehearsal Parcel, and Combined Payment Rules in the announcement hub.

Rehearsal parcels let you preview packing weight and dimensions before paying international freight—useful for spreadsheet buyers consolidating multiple rows. Combined payment rules explain when LitBuy lets you settle multiple warehouse items in one invoice.

Search these titles on litbuy.com/notice for the current wording.
